title: libMCdev
description: Contains a handful of utilities to aid in mod development.
body:
# libMCdev
_A development library mainly intended for me (AnOpenSauceDev) and my mods_

This mod is designed for mod-developers. Chances are, they have already baked this mod in via `Jar-In-Jar`. If not, you can download it from here. (libMCdev on its own will take priority over `include`-ed versions of this mod.)

## Features
- **An OS-grabbing tool**, that offers a more detailed view on OS information, especially on Linux.
- **A _primitive_ media API**, built off of Minecraft's own image system, that can be applied to just about anything.
- **A persistent variable API**, useful for storing small blocks of data across worlds (and servers).
- **A debug system, that allows** you to only execute code when running in development environments.

There's probably more, but a lot changes frequently. Speaking of that, **backwards compatability is not guaranteed.** The closest thing to "compatibility" ensured is whatever Methane calls. If you for some reason _do_ use libMCdev, let me know, and I can **partially** accomodate for that.

As always, if you want to work with this, you should read the [docs here.](https://github.com/AnOpenSauceDev/libmcdev-fabric/wiki)
